title: Vaa Chellam  lyrics Thoranai song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vaa Chellam
Singer: Udit Narayan
Lyrics: Pa. Vijay
Movie: Thoranai

vaa chellam vaa vaa chellam
nadakkira pattam poochi nee thane
aaradi aal thaan chellam
kudhikkira kuchi mittai naan thaane

unne unne paarkanum pesanum pazhaganum
kannum kannum sirikkanum
kanavu thaan kaananum
posukkunnu purushan-nnu sonnadhum
hayyo hayyo hayyo hayyo

en manasa en manasa yen poottura
mel udhada keezh udhada yen aatura

ice vaikkiran ice vaikkiran urugathadi
nice pannuraan nice pannuraan nambathadi

vaa chellam vaa vaa chellam
nadakkira pattam poochi nee thane
aaradi aal thaan chellam
kudhikkira kuchi mittai naan thaane

vanavillil dupatta vaangi vandhu vaikatta
pournamikke powder podatta
un azhaga kal vetta naan sedhukka sollatta
padhayellam poovai nikkatta

ooril ulla marangal onnume vidame
un perai thaan sedhukki vachen vachen nenjil vachen

en kanavil en kanavil un sithiram
en edhiril en edhiril natchathiram

nool viduraan nool viduraan sikkathadi
reel vidaraan reel vidaraan maatathadi

england raanikka indhiavil kalyanam
enbadhu pol katti kolveney
nee enakku ponjadhi aana pinne en paadhi
rani maha rani nee-thaaney
enakku mattum azhage onne serthu retta pulla

nee enakku nee enakku vellamadi
naan unakku naan unakku sellamadi

full coloril full colorul padam kaaturaan
reel kanakkil reel kanakkil poo suthuraan

vaa chellam vaa vaa chellam
nadakkira pattam poochi nee thane
aaradi aal thaan chellam
kudhikkira kuchi mittai naan thaane

unne unne paarkanum pesanum pazhaganum
kannum kannum sirikkanum
kanavu thaan kaananum
posukkunnu purushan-nnu sonnadhum
hayyo hayyo hayyo hayyo

dey sagalai dey sagalai kavuthup-puttan
poo manasa poo manasu pudhichup-puttan
poi puzhuvi poi puzhivi saachuputtan
un nenaippe en nenaippe sodhappiputtan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vaa Chellam'?

The song 'Vaa Chellam' expresses the joy and excitement of love, inviting the beloved to come closer and share beautiful moments together.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thoranai'?

In Thoranai, 'Vaa Chellam' is a romantic sequence that highlights the blossoming relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Vaa Chellam'?

The song is sung by Udit Narayan and composed by Mani Sharma, known for their exceptional contributions to Tamil music.

When was 'Vaa Chellam' released?

'Vaa Chellam' was released on May 11, 2009, as part of the movie Thoranai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Vaa Chellam', the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions and longing for his beloved, making it a quintessential romantic track. The song's upbeat tempo and joyful lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and love. It beautifully conveys the excitement and happiness that comes with being in love. This enchanting melody is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the bliss of romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaa Chellam from Thoranai is a delightful romantic number that showcases Udit Narayan's enchanting vocals paired with Mani Sharma's captivating music. The song radiates joy and is perfect for celebrating love and happiness. Dive into this melodious journey that beautifully captures the essence of romance!
stanzaMeanings: Come, dear one, come. The boat is moving, and you are the one who is making it go. I am the sweet treat that you are enjoying.
I want to see you, talk to you, and smile with you. I want to dream and be with you, and I feel like a man when I say this.
My heart, my heart, why are you so restless? Why are you troubled beneath the surface?
They are putting ice, making it nice, and it feels good.
Come, dear one, come. The boat is moving, and you are the one who is making it go. I am the sweet treat that you are enjoying.
In the sky, I bring a dupatta for the full moon. I sprinkle powder on your beauty and want to capture it.
In the village, the trees won't let go of your name. I have kept it in my heart.
In my dreams, you are the star that shines in front of me.
The thread is breaking, the reel is spinning, and it won't stop.
In England, marriage is like a bond. I will tie it for you, and you are my queen.
When the first child is born, it brings laughter.
Only for me, you are beautiful, and I want to hold you close.
You and I, we are like water together.
In full color, the film is being shown, and the reel is spinning.
Come, dear one, come. The boat is moving, and you are the one who is making it go. I am the sweet treat that you are enjoying.
I want to see you, talk to you, and smile with you. I want to dream and be with you, and I feel like a man when I say this.
Hey, everything is in my heart. I have captured your thoughts and feelings.
